title: epipactis humilior
intro: Epipactis humilior, also known as the lowly helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe, found in woodland and scrub habitats. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Epipactis humilior include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and wounds. Epipactis humilior can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, often used in folk medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
